commands.payload:
Slopwatch.Cmd 0.4.0+8261a7d24bf91d95fb32bb844ff94409f9f0210c
Copyright © 2025-2026 Aaron Stannard

  analyze       (Default Verb) Analyze files for LLM-generated code patterns

  init          Initialize slopwatch in a project - creates baseline from
                existing code

  list-rules    List all available detection rules

  help          Display more information on a specific command.

  version       Display version information.

result.stderr:
Slopwatch.Cmd 0.4.0+8261a7d24bf91d95fb32bb844ff94409f9f0210c
Copyright © 2025-2026 Aaron Stannard

  -f, --files          Specific files to analyze (can be multiple)

  -d, --directory      Directory to analyze (default: current directory)

  -p, --patterns       Glob patterns to match (default: **/*.cs, **/*.razor,
                       **/*.cshtml, **/*.csproj, **/*.props, **/*.targets)

  -o, --output         Output format: console, json (default: console)

  --min-severity       Minimum severity to report: info, warning, error
                       (default: warning)

  --fail-on            Exit with code 1 if issues at this severity or higher:
                       info, warning, error (default: error)

  --exclude            Patterns to exclude

  -c, --config         Path to configuration file

  --baseline           Path to baseline file (default: .slopwatch/baseline.json)

  --no-baseline        Skip baseline checking - report ALL detections (useful
                       for initial setup)

  --create-baseline    Create a baseline file from current detections (skips
                       normal output)

  --update-baseline    Add new detections to an existing baseline file

  -v, --verbose        Show verbose output including baseline loading details

  --hook               Hook mode for Claude Code integration: only analyzes git
                       dirty files for speed, outputs errors to stderr,
                       suppresses other output, fails on warnings by default,
                       exits with code 2 on failure

  --stats              Show analysis statistics (files analyzed, time elapsed)

  --parallel           Number of parallel workers for file analysis (default:
                       processor count, 0 = sequential)

  --help               Display this help screen.

  --version            Display version information.

Slopwatch.Cmd 0.4.0+8261a7d24bf91d95fb32bb844ff94409f9f0210c
Copyright © 2025-2026 Aaron Stannard

  -d, --directory    Directory to initialize (default: current directory)

  -p, --patterns     Glob patterns to match (default: **/*.cs, **/*.razor,
                     **/*.cshtml, **/*.csproj, **/*.props, **/*.targets)

  --exclude          Patterns to exclude

  -f, --force        Overwrite existing baseline file if it exists

  --min-severity     Minimum severity to baseline: info, warning, error
                     (default: info)

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.
